## Checklist

- [ ] `tox -e lint` passes (pyrefly type check)
- [ ] `tox -e test` passes (unit + regression tests)
- [ ] `tox -e security` passes (bandit scan)
- [ ] `cd ui && npm run build` passes (if UI changed)
- [ ] No new pip/npm packages added without maintainer approval
- [ ] No em dashes in any committed document
- [ ] No `#hackthekitty/` files staged
- [ ] PR targets `develop`, not `main`
